theme: Would You Like a Robot Companion?

sentences.english: One area of technology which has been in the news a lot recently is robotics.
sentences.korean: 최근 뉴스에 많이 나오는 기술 분야 중 하나는 로보틱스예요.

sentences.english: Humanoid robots, meaning robots which appear and behave like humans, are being built to help us do everything from washing the dishes to babysitting the kids.
sentences.korean: 인간처럼 보이고 행동하는 휴머노이드 로봇이 설거지부터 아이 돌보기까지 모든 것을 돕기 위해 만들어지고 있어요.

sentences.english: With advances in AI, robots are becoming smart enough to develop meaningful relationships with humans.
sentences.korean: AI의 발전으로 로봇이 인간과 의미 있는 관계를 맺을 만큼 똑똑해지고 있어요.

sentences.english: There are reports of people telling their secrets to robot therapists and even falling in love with their robot friend!
sentences.korean: 로봇 치료사에게 비밀을 말하거나 심지어 로봇 친구와 사랑에 빠지는 사례도 있어요!

quiz.question: What does '동반자, 친구' mean in English?
